NWSheadline: THE TORNADO WARNING FOR NORTHWESTERN PLAQUEMINES PARISH IS CANCELLED

properties.headline: Tornado Warning issued April 25 at 7:21AM CDT until April 25 at 7:45AM CDT by NWS New Orleans LA
properties.description:
At 721 AM CDT, a severe thunderstorm capable of producing a tornado
was located near Belle Chasse, moving southeast at 40 mph.

HAZARD...Tornado.

SOURCE...Radar indicated rotation.

IMPACT...Flying debris will be dangerous to those caught without
shelter. Mobile homes will be damaged or destroyed. Damage
to roofs, windows, and vehicles will occur.  Tree damage is
likely.

This tornadic thunderstorm will remain over mainly rural areas of
northwestern Plaquemines Parish.
properties.instruction:
TAKE COVER NOW! Move to a basement or an interior room on the lowest
floor of a sturdy building. Avoid windows. If you are outdoors, in a
mobile home, or in a vehicle, move to the closest substantial shelter
and protect yourself from flying debris.

NWSheadline: THE TORNADO WARNING FOR NORTHEASTERN ST. CHARLES PARISH IS CANCELLED

properties.headline: Tornado Warning issued April 25 at 6:35AM CDT until April 25 at 7:15AM CDT by NWS New Orleans LA
properties.description:
TORLIX

The National Weather Service in New Orleans has issued a

* Tornado Warning for...
Northeastern St. Charles Parish in southeastern Louisiana...
Northwestern Jefferson Parish in southeastern Louisiana...

* Until 715 AM CDT.

* At 635 AM CDT, a severe thunderstorm capable of producing a tornado
was located near Destrehan, or near Hahnville, moving southeast at
35 mph.

HAZARD...Tornado.

SOURCE...Radar indicated rotation.

IMPACT...Flying debris will be dangerous to those caught without
shelter. Mobile homes will be damaged or destroyed.
Damage to roofs, windows, and vehicles will occur.  Tree
damage is likely.

* This dangerous storm will be near...
Metairie, St. Rose, Ama, Waggaman, and River Ridge around 640 AM
CDT.
Avondale, Jefferson, Harahan, and Elmwood around 645 AM CDT.

Other locations impacted by this tornadic thunderstorm include New
Orleans Armstrong Airport.

This includes the following Interstates...
Interstate 10 in Louisiana between mile markers 213 and 227.
Interstate 310 between mile markers 1 and 2.
properties.instruction:
TAKE COVER NOW! Move to a basement or an interior room on the lowest
floor of a sturdy building. Avoid windows. If you are outdoors, in a
mobile home, or in a vehicle, move to the closest substantial shelter
and protect yourself from flying debris.

CMAMtext: NWS: TORNADO WARNING in this area til 7:15 AM CDT. Take shelter now. Check media.
CMAMlongtext: National Weather Service: TORNADO WARNING in this area until 7:15 AM CDT. Take shelter now in a basement or an interior room on the lowest floor of a sturdy building. If you are outdoors, in a mobile home, or in a vehicle, move to the closest substantial shelter and protect yourself from flying debris. Check media.

properties.headline: Tornado Warning issued April 25 at 4:24AM CDT until April 25 at 4:30AM CDT by NWS Jackson MS
properties.description:
The tornado threat has diminished and the Tornado Warning has been
cancelled. However, damaging winds remain likely and a Severe
Thunderstorm Warning remains in effect for the area.

To report severe weather, contact your nearest law enforcement
agency. They will relay your report to the National Weather Service
Jackson.

building. Avoid windows. If you are outdoors, in a mobile home, or in
a vehicle, move to the closest substantial shelter and protect
yourself from flying debris.

properties.headline: Tornado Warning issued April 24 at 10:42PM CDT until April 24 at 11:00PM CDT by NWS Shreveport LA
properties.description:
At 1042 PM CDT, a severe thunderstorm capable of producing a tornado
was located 6 miles northwest of Diana, or 6 miles east of Gilmer,
moving southeast at 40 mph.

HAZARD...Tornado and quarter size hail.

SOURCE...Radar indicated rotation.

IMPACT...Flying debris will be dangerous to those caught without
shelter. Mobile homes will be damaged or destroyed. Damage
to roofs, windows and vehicles will occur. Tree damage is
likely.

Locations impacted include...
Gilmer, East Mountain and Diana.
properties.instruction:
Move to an interior room on the lowest floor of a well-built building
away from windows. If you are outdoors, in a mobile home, or in a
vehicle, move to the closest substantial shelter and protect yourself
from flying debris.

Tornadoes are difficult to observe at night. Take cover now!

properties.description: The Tornado Warning has been cancelled and is no longer in effect.

NWSheadline: TORNADO WARNING IS CANCELLED FOR SOUTHWESTERN CAMP COUNTY

properties.headline: Tornado Warning issued April 24 at 10:39PM CDT until April 24 at 11:00PM CDT by NWS Shreveport LA
properties.description:
At 1039 PM CDT, a severe thunderstorm capable of producing a tornado
was located near Gilmer, moving southeast at 35 mph.

HAZARD...Tornado and quarter size hail.

SOURCE...Radar indicated rotation.

IMPACT...Flying debris will be dangerous to those caught without
shelter. Mobile homes will be damaged or destroyed. Damage
to roofs, windows and vehicles will occur. Tree damage is
likely.

Locations impacted include...
Gladewater, Gilmer, East Mountain, West Mountain, Diana, Union
Grove and Bettie.
properties.instruction:
Move to an interior room on the lowest floor of a well-built building
away from windows. If you are outdoors, in a mobile home, or in a
vehicle, move to the closest substantial shelter and protect yourself
from flying debris.

Tornadoes are difficult to observe at night. Take cover now!

NWSheadline: TORNADO WARNING REMAINS IN EFFECT UNTIL 11 PM CDT FOR CENTRAL UPSHUR COUNTY

properties.areaDesc: Camp, TX; Franklin, TX; Titus, TX; Upshur, TX
properties.headline: Tornado Warning issued April 24 at 10:38PM CDT until April 24 at 10:45PM CDT by NWS Shreveport LA
properties.description:
The storm which prompted the warning has moved out of the area.
Therefore, the warning will be allowed to expire. However, gusty
winds are still possible with this thunderstorm.

A Severe Thunderstorm Watch remains in effect until 400 AM CDT
Saturday for a portion of northeast Texas.

NWSheadline: TORNADO WARNING WILL EXPIRE AT 1045 PM CDT FOR CAMP, SOUTHEASTERN FRANKLIN, SOUTHWESTERN TITUS AND NORTHWESTERN UPSHUR COUNTIES

properties.headline: Tornado Warning issued April 24 at 10:23PM CDT until April 24 at 11:15PM CDT by NWS Jackson MS
properties.description:
TORJAN

The National Weather Service in Jackson has issued a

* Tornado Warning for...
Southwestern Covington County in southeastern Mississippi...
Southern Jefferson Davis County in south central Mississippi...

* Until 1115 PM CDT.

* At 1023 PM CDT, a severe thunderstorm capable of producing a
tornado was located near Progress, or near Prentiss, moving east at
30 mph.

HAZARD...Tornado and golf ball size hail.

SOURCE...Radar indicated rotation.

IMPACT...Flying debris will be dangerous to those caught without
shelter. Mobile homes will be damaged or destroyed.
Damage to roofs, windows, and vehicles will occur.  Tree
damage is likely.

* This dangerous storm will be near...
Bassfield and Carson around 1030 PM CDT.
Melba around 1035 PM CDT.
properties.instruction:
TAKE COVER NOW! Move to a basement or an interior room on the lowest
floor of a sturdy building. Avoid windows. If you are outdoors, in a
mobile home, or in a vehicle, move to the closest substantial shelter
and protect yourself from flying debris.

CMAMtext: NWS: TORNADO WARNING in this area til 11:15 PM CDT. Take shelter now. Check media.
CMAMlongtext: National Weather Service: TORNADO WARNING in this area until 11:15 PM CDT. Take shelter now in a basement or an interior room on the lowest floor of a sturdy building. If you are outdoors, in a mobile home, or in a vehicle, move to the closest substantial shelter and protect yourself from flying debris. Check media.

properties.headline: Tornado Warning issued April 24 at 10:20PM CDT until April 24 at 11:00PM CDT by NWS Shreveport LA
properties.description:
TORSHV

The National Weather Service in Shreveport has issued a

* Tornado Warning for...
Southwestern Camp County in northeastern Texas...
Central Upshur County in northeastern Texas...

* Until 1100 PM CDT.

* At 1020 PM CDT, a severe thunderstorm capable of producing a
tornado was located 6 miles south of Pittsburg, moving southeast at
35 mph.

HAZARD...Tornado.

SOURCE...Radar indicated rotation.

IMPACT...Flying debris will be dangerous to those caught without
shelter. Mobile homes will be damaged or destroyed. Damage
to roofs, windows and vehicles will occur. Tree damage is
likely.

* Locations impacted include...
Gladewater, Gilmer, Pittsburg, East Mountain, West Mountain, Diana,
Union Grove, Midway and Bettie.
properties.instruction:
Move to an interior room on the lowest floor of a well-built building
away from windows. If you are outdoors, in a mobile home, or in a
vehicle, move to the closest substantial shelter and protect yourself
from flying debris.

Tornadoes are difficult to observe at night. Take cover now!

CMAMtext: NWS: TORNADO WARNING in this area til 11:00 PM CDT. Take shelter now. Check media.
CMAMlongtext: National Weather Service: TORNADO WARNING in this area until 11:00 PM CDT. Take shelter now in a basement or an interior room on the lowest floor of a sturdy building. If you are outdoors, in a mobile home, or in a vehicle, move to the closest substantial shelter and protect yourself from flying debris. Check media.
